summary: Comprehensive testing of BISD HUB iteration 4 completed. Backend APIs show 100% success rate (39/39 tests passed including new repost, file upload, and share tests). Frontend UI and integration testing shows 100% success with all major functionality working including feed tabs, repost/share buttons, create post with visibility options, global chat with WebSocket, DM, profile editing, settings with dark mode, and all 3 staff panels with searchbars.
passed_tests: Login with ADMIN001/admin123 - redirects to main app
Login with MOD001/mod123 - moderator access works
Login with MGMT001/management123 - management access works
Main feed loads with all 4 feed tabs (Official, Public, Following, Friends)
Feed tab switching works correctly
Repost buttons present on posts (16 found)
Share buttons present on posts (16 found)
Like buttons present on posts (16 found)
Create Post dialog opens with visibility selector (Public Feed, Profile Only, Friends Only, Official)
Create Post dialog has Add Image button for image upload
Global Chat - WebSocket connects and shows 'Connected' status
Chat rooms sidebar shows: General, Boys Only, Girls Only, Class N/A, Section N/A
DM page shows conversation list with existing conversations
Search bar on right side - real-time search when typing shows users and posts
Click user avatar/name in post navigates to their profile
User Profile page shows: banner, avatar, display name, badges (Administrator), bio, followers/following/friends count
Edit Profile dialog allows: display name change, bio update, PFP upload, banner upload, privacy toggles
Settings page shows: dark mode toggle, privacy settings, friend requests, friends list, account info
Dark mode toggle works - theme changes globally
Admin Panel has searchbar in Users tab - filters users correctly
Admin Panel shows Pending registrations with Review Application button
Moderation Panel has searchbar in User Actions tab - filters users correctly
Management Panel has searchbar in Users tab - filters users correctly
Management Panel shows password hashes for superior access
Navigation: Home, Global Chat, Messages, Profile, Settings all work
Backend: Repost API (POST /api/posts/{post_id}/repost) works
Backend: File upload API (POST /api/upload) works with image files
Backend: Invalid file type rejected correctly
seed_data_creation: Test posts, reposts, and DMs created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 are working. Backend APIs are 100% functional including new repost and file upload endpoints. WebSocket chat is connected and working. All 3 staff panels (Admin, Moderation, Management) have searchbars in their respective Users tabs. Feed tabs (Official, Public, Following, Friends) work correctly. Post visibility options (Public, Profile Only, Friends Only, Official) work. Edit Profile dialog has all required fields including PFP and banner upload. Settings page has dark mode toggle which works globally. Dark mode CSS is properly applied. Repost and Share buttons are present on all posts. The email notification system uses Resend but RESEND_API_KEY is empty - emails will fail silently (expected behavior as noted in mocked_api).
